headline: MAGA Slush Fund 💰🚫 DOA: Thune 🦅🔨 Slays Trump’s 1.8B Bribe Bonanza 🍔💥
text: Trump 🍊👑 tried to drop a $1.8B taxpayer-funded 💸🍔 revenge buffet on his loyal MAGA 🍔🍟 crew but the GOP 🍆🔥 mutinied faster than you can say ‘January 6️⃣🍆’. Acting AG Todd Blanche 🧔💼 yanked the plug on the so-called ‘anti-weaponisation’ fund after Senate GOPers Ted Cruz 🤠📢 & John Thune 🦅🔨 went full Karen mode in a private 21 May scream-fest, yelling ‘SELF-DEALING 🤡💰!’ at Blanche like he stole their lunch money. The fund was supposed to ‘make whole’ folks Trump said Biden’s DOJ 🎯🔫 targeted, including possible Jan 6️⃣ rioters who’d get paid like they were in a Capitol riot NFT drop 🖼️💸. Republicans and Democrats both called the Trump-family tax-audit shield 🛡️😎 straight-up corrupt, and even Trump’s own ex-adviser spilled ‘self-inflicted wound’ tea ☕🍵. While gas prices ⛽📈 & Iran war vibes 🇮🇷💥 tanked Trump’s approval like a crypto rug-pull 📉🐐, GOP lawmakers stalled an ICE/CBP funding bill 🚨🛂 to force the fund’s funeral. A federal judge ⚖️📜 ordered a timeout, Dems threatened amendments to kill any future MAGA slush fund forever, and Schumer 🧓💬 tweeted ‘Blanche & Trump’s words are worthless’ like he was subtweeting a bad date. Bottom line: even in Trump’s second term the GOP is showing they’ll push back when the president’s power moves go full ‘my way or the highway’ 🚗💨. The saga ain’t over—litigation & amendments keep the drama alive like a reality-TV reunion special 📺🍿. GOP flexing muscles 💪🔥 & Dems loading campaign ads 🎥💣 means this slush-fund soap opera 🍲📺 is just getting started.
